caption:
A roofer we work with used to dread storm season. The phone never stopped — and he missed half of it.

Storm hits, everyone rings at once: evenings, weekends, usually while he's already up on a roof. The missed calls went to whoever picked up. So we gave him a receptionist for the overflow and after-hours — it answers every storm call, flags the urgent ones, books the rest.

The 9pm 'my roof's leaking' call now gets answered and booked without him climbing down. Storm season went from chaos to a full diary.

Missing the emergency calls? Start with after-hours. Free audit — link in bio. 👇

#roofer #roofing #tradesbusiness #ukandireland #aireceptionist
